Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.Tools
ChangelogMessages: Added `--invoke-mode` switch to the `invoke-function` command with values RequestResponse (default), Event, Stream and DurableExecution. Stream invokes the function with InvokeWithResponseStream and streams the response to the console; Event invokes asynchronously and displays any function error and the durable execution ARN; DurableExecution invokes asynchronously and monitors the durable execution by polling GetDurableExecution and GetDurableExecutionHistory, resolving the latest published version ARN when a function name is supplied
The `deploy-function` and `update-function-config` commands now write the new function version ARN to the output when `--function-publish` is set to true
